algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived egress ramp run-length formula
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: ramp for elevation change in construction documents. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: ramp for elevation change in construction documents
scenario_facts.ramp_run_model_note: Public scenario model uses ramp_run_length_ft >= rise_ft / running_slope.
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Construction drawing ramp review variant: documentation context, fixed rise_ft 1.8, wider available run and landing-review weight.

query_preferences.meaning: prefer documentation-compliant generous landing while checking run length

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: ramp for elevation change in construction documents

algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Construction drawing ramp review variant: documentation context, fixed rise_ft 1.8, wider available run and landing-review weight.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains a helper expression such as max(), abs(), symbolic division, or a variable product.
